## Checklist

- [ ] `swift test` passes
- [ ] I tested the change manually in the app and/or CLI
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation (README/BUILD/INSTALL/CHANGELOG)
- [ ] My changes don't introduce new compiler warnings
- [ ] No API keys, secrets, or personal file paths are included in this diff
